texto: Many evolutionists today... continually promote the idea that 'Big Change = Small Change x Millions of Years'. This is logical fallacy... It is akin to saying "because a cow can jump over a fence, it it only a matter of time and practice for it to jump over the moon.
explicacao: Citação de Dr. Donald Batten sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Many evolutionists today... continually promote the idea that 'Big Change = Small Change x Millio…” articula tempo, evolution, science em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e science.
